LanguageData.crimsondynasty.label: <color=#B22222>crimson dynasty</color>
LanguageData.crimsondynasty.description:
An awakened hemogenic lineage sustains predator, hemogenic, mesmer, and dreadguard channels at all times. Blood resonance is additionally granted only when the host carries the Hemogenic gene, and its stage adjusts dynamically with current blood state. Linked effects switch with state: bloodfrenzy at 45% or lower health in combat, noble poise above 80% health out of combat, and duelist ascendancy during melee engagements.
created/edited by easyrim
LanguageData.crimsondynasty_predator.label: predator grace
LanguageData.crimsondynasty_predator.description:
Predatory reflexes grant fast closes, clean strikes, and precise body control.
created/edited by easyrim
LanguageData.crimsondynasty_hemogenic.label: hemogenic vigor
LanguageData.crimsondynasty_hemogenic.description:
Blood chemistry turns preternaturally efficient, accelerating recovery and resistance.
created/edited by easyrim
LanguageData.crimsondynasty_mesmer.label: mesmeric authority
LanguageData.crimsondynasty_mesmer.description:
A cold aristocratic presence unsettles rivals and compels obedience in conversation.
created/edited by easyrim
LanguageData.crimsondynasty_dreadguard.label: dreadguard resilience
LanguageData.crimsondynasty_dreadguard.description:
Battle-hardened bloodline resilience dampens pain and keeps the host fighting through mortal wounds, but open flame remains dangerous.
created/edited by easyrim
LanguageData.crimsondynasty_bloodfrenzy.label: bloodfrenzy ascendant
LanguageData.crimsondynasty_bloodfrenzy.description:
At the edge of death, hunger and terror collapse into a monstrous battle crescendo.
created/edited by easyrim
LanguageData.crimsondynasty_noble_poise.label: noble poise
LanguageData.crimsondynasty_noble_poise.description:
When well-fed and unpressured, aristocratic control sharpens social coercion and colony-level command.
created/edited by easyrim
LanguageData.crimsondynasty_duelist_ascendancy.label: duelist ascendancy
LanguageData.crimsondynasty_duelist_ascendancy.descri:
Melee engagement unlocks predatory duelist routines focused on pressure and execution.
created/edited by easyrim
LanguageData.crimson_bloodrush_surge.label: bloodrush surge
LanguageData.crimson_bloodrush_surge.description:
The lineage is forcibly overdriven into a frenzy state. Lethality and speed explode, while restraint vanishes.
created/edited by easyrim
LanguageData.crimson_sovereign_gaze_marked.label: sovereign gaze marked
LanguageData.crimson_sovereign_gaze_marked.descriptio:
The target's will falters under predatory authority, reducing coordination and resistance.
created/edited by easyrim
